scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "const f=require('fs');f.copyFileSync('server/db/schema.sql','dist/server/db/schema.sql');f.copyFileSync('server/db/seed-sets.json','dist/server/db/seed-sets.json')" && npm --workspace web run build
